metadata.name: Mobi Golden Set v2 - Drawing Sets and Source-Backed Quantities
metadata.notes: V2 uses three official California DGS public plan/specification packages. Primary documents are drawing/plan PDFs, with project manuals and known addenda included as supporting documents. Key quantities are hand-read from cover sheets/plans and marked evidence_verified=true with sheet/page references. require_engine_quantity=false is used for this first v2 baseline to separate source-backed ground-truth capture from current engine quantity extraction; the report still records current engine quantity gaps and OCR/text extraction limitations.

projects.addenda_notes: The previously registered generic Addendum-1.pdf was inspected and is for DSH Coalinga Road Repairs project 000000000009928, not San Gorgonio. It is excluded. Official DGS inventory lists plans, project manual, For Reference Only, and DSA 103-19 artifacts; final construction-event addenda completeness remains unverified.
projects.agency: California Department of General Services / California Highway Patrol
ground_truth_scope_notes: Cover sheet G01 identifies the project scope as removing existing CMU walls, constructing new higher CMU walls, removing/replacing vehicle and man gates, and upgrading accessible parking/access route.
Parking and EV station tables are visible on cover sheet G01.
Plan set count is visible on cover sheet G01 as 19 SHEETS.

assumptions: Cover sheet parking calculation is treated as authoritative for ground-truth count.
key_quantities.evidence_snippet: PARKING SUMMARY: PUBLIC PARKING regular 25 accessible 2 totals 27
key_quantities.label: public parking
key_quantities.measurement_method: Read from cover sheet G01 parking calculation table.

key_quantities.evidence_snippet: EV CHARGING STATIONS: CHP EMPLOYEE regular 5 EV accessible 2 totals 7
key_quantities.label: ev charging stations
key_quantities.measurement_method: Read from cover sheet G01 electric vehicle charging stations table.

key_quantities.label: sheet index
key_quantities.measurement_method: Read from G01 sheet index count and verified with pdfinfo page count.

key_exclusions: No final estimate or pricing use
key_inclusions: Cover-sheet parking and EV quantity tables
projects.location: 195 Highland Springs Avenue, Beaumont, Riverside County, California
projects.title: San Gorgonio Pass Perimeter Fence - Plans
projects.addenda_completeness_method: Misattributed Addendum-1.pdf removed from evaluation after source inspection. Current DGS inventory has no San Gorgonio addendum label, but a final authoritative construction-event package cross-check is still required.

projects.addenda_notes: Direct DGS public folder probes found plans and project manual; no addendum PDF was found with common Addendum filename variants during this pass. Treat as addenda-incomplete until Cal eProcure event package is audited.
projects.agency: California Department of General Services / Office of Fleet and Asset Management
ground_truth_scope_notes: Cover sheet G001 identifies project as LOT 50 ACCESSIBILITY UPGRADES & EVCS and scope as parking space restriping and installation of new EV chargers.
Cover sheet G001 sheet index count is visible as Count: 20.
Sheet C011 includes stall and EVCS count tables; sheet E521 includes Type-2 EV charging station and panel schedule details.

key_quantities.label: total stalls level 1a
key_quantities.measurement_method: Read from C011 Number of Stalls per Level table, Total Stalls row, 1A column.

key_quantities.evidence_snippet: TYPE 2 EVCS COMPACT SIZE 5 ... STANDARD SIZE 0 ... ACCESSIBLE VAN 0 ... ACCESSIBLE CAR 0
key_quantities.item_name: Level GA Type 2 compact EVCS stalls
key_quantities.label: type 2 evcs compact size
key_quantities.measurement_method: Read from C011 Type 2 EVCS table, Compact Size row, GA column.

key_quantities.label: sheet index
key_quantities.measurement_method: Read from G001 sheet index count and verified with pdfinfo page count.

key_exclusions: No final estimate or pricing use
projects.title: Lot 50 Accessibility Upgrades & EVCS - Plans
projects.addenda_completeness_method: Direct public DGS Plans-and-Specs URL/folder probing plus saved-document review; Cal eProcure event package not fully audited.

projects.addenda_notes: Direct DGS public folder probes found plans and project manual; no addendum PDF was found with common Addendum filename variants during this pass. Treat as addenda-incomplete until Cal eProcure event package is audited.
projects.agency: California Department of General Services / Department of State Hospitals
ground_truth_scope_notes: Cover sheet G001 identifies the project as DSH Administration and Annex Building Roof Replacement Patton.
Building information table provides building area, project roofing area, stories, and occupant load.
Project scope note requires removal/replacement of built-up roofing and PVC roof system, insulation, flashing, drains, downspouts, gutters and parapet flashing.

key_quantities.evidence_snippet: AREA OF PROJECT IN SQUARE FEET:19,337 OF NEW ROOFING
key_quantities.label: new roofing area
key_quantities.measurement_method: Read from G001 building information table.

key_quantities.label: building area
key_quantities.measurement_method: Read from G001 building information table.

key_quantities.label: number of stories
key_quantities.measurement_method: Read from G001 building information table.

key_exclusions: No final estimate or pricing use
projects.location: 3102 E. Highland Avenue, Patton, San Bernardino County, California
